texto: I am done slowing down, giving people their time and space, letting them explore their options.
explicacao: Citação de Marla Miniano sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I am done slowing down, giving people their time and space, letting them explore their options.” articula reflexao, heartache, slowing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: When people say they don't want to get into a relationship, it should never be taken into face value because it is never really the whole truth. It is usually a vast collection of issues and fears and complications, forced to conceal one tiny hope lurking underneath it all: that someday, somebody will come along to discover, accept and understand and strengthen that feeble hope.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Marla Miniano sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “When people say they don't want to get into a relationship, it should never be taken into face va…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, love, relationship, útil em momentos de relationship.

frase_original: When people say they don't want to get into a relationship, it should never be taken into face value because it is never really the whole truth. It is usually a vast collection of issues and fears and complications, forced to conceal one tiny hope lurking underneath it all: that someday, somebody will come along to discover, accept and understand and strengthen that feeble hope.
